name: plan-screen-map
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,ux},deterministic-output |
 lens: nielsen-norman |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: PRIMARY_USERS
required_inputs.description: Primary user groups and the goal each one is trying to accomplish.

required_inputs.name: CONTENT_OBJECTS
required_inputs.description: Pages, screens, content groups, or entities that must exist in the structure.

required_inputs.name: ENTRY_POINTS
required_inputs.description: Where users enter the structure and what they expect to do from there.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_FLOWS
required_inputs.description: Known start-to-end flows that the IA must support.

required_inputs.name: NAV_CONSTRAINTS
required_inputs.description: Constraints such as platform limits, route rules, localization needs, or compliance requirements.
